messages.content:
## Routing

- **Tier:** Medium
- **Signals:** review-only PR diff; default merge-blocker filing; no edits
- **Invariant applied:** hands-off review → Medium (never Low)
- **Escalations:** none
- **Open questions:** none

Review · pr · Standard · Escalation: Stayed targeted contextual (closure-re-review; diff only touches prior theme `query-preservation`) · Pass: targeted contextual · Filing: merge-blockers only

**Depth:** Standard

Anti-thrash preflight: prior Action findings exist for `query-preservation`. Classified as closure-re-review. Themes reconstructed; no unresolved contradictions; scope did not expand. Preferring targeted contextual re-review (Standard, 2 members) instead of another Full baseline council.

## Findings
No merge-blockers in scope.

## Review synthesis
Pass stayed targeted contextual because the diff only closes the prior theme. Exit gate green — findings-first; no Continuity footer; no theme table.
